project_metadata.name: Rubifo - Rubika Auto-Forward Bot
project_metadata.purpose: Complete payment flow, route management, scheduling, and bot UX

critical_rules: 🔴 NO ORM - Use asyncpg with raw SQL only
🔴 No global state - use dependency injection
🔴 Service layer pattern (no DB calls in handlers)

M2.name: Payment System Completion
M2.description: Wire payment flow, implement /renew, admin dashboard

M3.name: Routes & Queue System
M3.description: Route management commands, queue FIFO logic

M4.name: Scheduling & Execution Engine
M4.description: Schedule models, execution loop, message forwarding

M5.name: Bot Commands & UX
M5.description: Help messages, calendar, logging, state machine

milestone_2.name: Complete /buy command payment flow
milestone_2.description: Wire together Zarinpal payment with subscription creation and route activation
acceptance_criteria: Zarinpal payment link generated and sent
On success: subscription created, routes activated, confirmation sent
On timeout/failure: user receives error message with retry option
implementation_steps: 1. Update handle_buy() to show tier options
5. Start polling: process_payment_and_activate(user_id, authority, tier, amount)
milestone_2.code_template:
async def handle_tier_selection(client, user_id, tier):
    """Handle subscription tier selection and start payment."""
    try:
        from src.database import pool
        from src.integrations.zarinpal import create_zarinpal_gateway
        from src.core.subscription_service import SubscriptionService
        
        prices = {'basic': 50000, 'pro': 120000, 'enterprise': 350000}
        amount = prices[tier]
        description = f'Rubifo subscription: {tier} tier'
        
        zarinpal = create_zarinpal_gateway(sandbox=True)
        success, result = await zarinpal.request_payment(amount, description)
        
        if success:
            payment_url = result
            message = f'لینک پرداخت:\n{payment_url}\n\nبعد از پرداخت، تائید خودکار انجام می‌شود.'
            await client.send_message(user_id, message)
            
            asyncio.create_task(
                process_payment_and_activate(user_id, payment_url, tier, amount, client)
            )
        else:
            await client.send_message(user_id, 'خطا در درخواست پرداخت')
    except Exception as e:
        logger.error(f'Error in tier selection: {e}')
        await client.send_message(user_id, 'خطایی رخ داد')
testing_requirements: Test error messages for failed payments
milestone_2.commit_message:
T17: Complete /buy command payment flow

- Add tier selection handlers (/buy_basic, /buy_pro, /buy_enterprise)
- Generate Zarinpal payment link
- Send link to user with instructions
- Implement polling verification (every 10s for 5 min)
- On success: create subscription with 30-day duration
- On success: activate all user routes
- On success: insert completed transaction
- On success: send confirmation in Farsi
- On timeout/failure: send error message
- Proper error handling and logging

milestone_2.name: Implement /renew command
milestone_2.description: Allow users to renew their subscription for another month
acceptance_criteria: /renew shows current subscription tier and end date
implementation_steps: 3. If no subscription: send message 'شما اشتراک فعالی ندارید'
4. If has subscription: show tier + end_date
6. Generate payment link for same tier
milestone_2.code_template:
async def handle_renew(client, user_id):
    """Handle /renew command for subscription renewal."""
    try:
        from src.database import pool
        from src.core.subscription_service import SubscriptionService
        
        sub_service = SubscriptionService(pool)
        sub = await sub_service.get_active_subscription(user_id)
        
        if not sub:
            await client.send_message(user_id, 'شما اشتراک فعالی ندارید.\n/buy برای خریدبفرستید.')
            return
        
        message = f'اشتراک فعلی: {sub.tier}\nتا تاریخ: {sub.end_date}\n\nبرای تمدید ۳۰ روزه /renew_confirm را بفرستید'
        await client.send_message(user_id, message)
testing_requirements: Verify payment link generated for same tier

- Create handle_renew() command handler
- Check for active subscription

- Implement polling verification
- Extend subscription by 30 days on success
- Record transaction
- Send confirmation message
- Error handling for no active subscription

milestone_2.name: Create admin payment dashboard
milestone_2.description: FastAPI endpoints for admin to view transactions and revenue stats
acceptance_criteria: GET /admin/transactions - filter by user_id, status, date range
GET /admin/stats - total revenue, counts by tier

transactions_list.returns: List of transactions with pagination info

transactions_stats.returns: Total count, total amount, breakdown by tier

milestone_2.code_template:
from fastapi import APIRouter, Depends, HTTPException, Query
from datetime import datetime, date
from typing import Optional

router = APIRouter(prefix="/admin")

@router.get("/transactions")
async def get_transactions(
    user_id: Optional[int] = None,
    status: Optional[str] = None,
    from_date: Optional[str] = None,
    to_date: Optional[str] = None,
    limit: int = 100,
    offset: int = 0,
    username: str = Depends(verify_token)
) -> dict:
    """Get transactions with filtering."""
    try:
        from src.database import pool
        from src.core.transaction_service import TransactionService
        
        trans_service = TransactionService(pool)
        transactions = await trans_service.get_transactions(
            user_id=user_id,
            status=status,
            limit=limit,
            offset=offset
        )
        
        return {
            "transactions": transactions,
            "count": len(transactions),
            "limit": limit,
            "offset": offset
        }
    except Exception as e:
        logger.error(f'Error fetching transactions: {e}')
        raise HTTPException(status_code=500, detail='Error fetching transactions')

@router.get("/stats")
async def get_stats(username: str = Depends(verify_token)) -> dict:
    """Get revenue statistics."""
    try:
        from src.database import pool
        from src.core.transaction_service import TransactionService
        
        trans_service = TransactionService(pool)
        stats = await trans_service.get_revenue_stats()
        by_tier = await trans_service.get_revenue_by_tier()
        
        return {
            "total": stats,
            "by_tier": by_tier
        }
    except Exception as e:
        logger.error(f'Error fetching stats: {e}')
        raise HTTPException(status_code=500, detail='Error fetching stats')

milestone_3.name: /addroute command (part 2: queue population)
milestone_3.description: Complete /addroute: create route and populate queue from existing posts
acceptance_criteria: Fetch all existing posts from source channel
Insert posts into post_queue with status='pending'
User receives confirmation with post count
implementation_steps: 2. Insert route into database via route_service.create_route()
3. Fetch posts from source channel via Rubika API
5. For each post: insert into post_queue with status='pending'
6. Send confirmation: '{post_count} پست به صف اضافه شد'
milestone_3.code_template:
async def populate_queue(client, user_id, source_id, target_id, route_id):
    """Populate queue from existing posts in source channel."""
    try:
        from src.integrations.rubika import fetch_channel_posts
        from src.database import pool
        
        posts = await fetch_channel_posts(source_id)
        posts.sort(key=lambda x: x['date'])  # FIFO order
        
        for post in posts:
            await pool.execute(
                'INSERT INTO post_queue (route_id, message_id_in_source, source_date, status) '
                'VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4)',
                route_id, post['id'], post['date'], 'pending'
            )
        
        message = f'✅ مسیر ایجاد شد!\n{len(posts)} پست به صف اضافه شد.\n\n/listroutes برای مشاهده'
        await client.send_message(user_id, message)

milestone_3.name: Create queue management service
milestone_3.description: Service for FIFO queue operations used by execution engine
acceptance_criteria: get_next_pending(route_id) - returns next message (ORDER BY source_date)
mark_failed(queue_id, error) - set status='failed', increment retry_count
milestone_3.code_template:
class QueueService:
    def __init__(self, db):
        self.db = db
    
    async def get_next_pending(self, route_id: int) -> Optional[dict]:
        """Get next pending message (FIFO by source_date)."""
        result = await self.db.fetchrow(
            'SELECT * FROM post_queue WHERE route_id = $1 AND status = \'pending\' '
            'ORDER BY source_date ASC LIMIT 1',
            route_id
        )
        return dict(result) if result else None
    
    async def mark_sent(self, queue_id: int) -> None:
        """Mark message as sent."""
        await self.db.execute(
            'UPDATE post_queue SET status = \'sent\' WHERE id = $1',
            queue_id
        )
    
    async def mark_failed(self, queue_id: int, error: str) -> None:
        """Mark message as failed and increment retry count."""
        await self.db.execute(
            'UPDATE post_queue SET status = \'failed\', last_error = $1, retry_count = retry_count + 1 WHERE id = $2',
            error, queue_id
        )
milestone_3.commit_message:

- get_next_pending() - FIFO ordering by source_date

milestone_4.name: Create execution_engine.py
milestone_4.description: Main loop that executes schedules and sends messages
acceptance_criteria: For each schedule where next_run <= NOW:
- Get next pending message from queue
On error: mark as failed, add to retry queue
milestone_4.code_template:
class ExecutionEngine:
    def __init__(self, db, bot_client):
        self.db = db
        self.client = bot_client
    
    async def run(self):
        """Main execution loop."""
        from src.database import pool
        from src.core.schedule_service import ScheduleService
        from src.core.queue_service import QueueService
        
        sched_service = ScheduleService(pool)
        queue_service = QueueService(pool)
        
        while True:
            try:
                schedules = await self.db.fetch(
                    'SELECT * FROM schedules WHERE is_active = true AND next_run <= NOW()'
                )
                
                for schedule in schedules:
                    await self._execute_schedule(schedule, sched_service, queue_service)
                
                await asyncio.sleep(30)  # Check every 30 seconds
            
            except Exception as e:
                logger.error(f'Execution engine error: {e}')
                await asyncio.sleep(5)
    
    async def _execute_schedule(self, schedule, sched_service, queue_service):
        """Execute one schedule's messages."""
        # Get next pending message
        # Forward to target
        # Mark as sent
        # Calculate next_run
        pass
milestone_4.commit_message:
T37: Create execution_engine.py

- Create src/core/execution_engine.py with ExecutionEngine class
- Main loop: check schedules every 30 seconds
- Execute schedules with next_run <= NOW
- Get next pending message from queue (FIFO)
- Forward message to target channel
- Mark as sent in queue
- Calculate new next_run
- On error: mark as failed, store error

milestone_5.name: Implement /help command

milestone_5.help_text:
دستورات Rubifo:

👤 کاربری:
/start - شروع و ثبت‌نام
/buy - خرید اشتراک
/renew - تمدید اشتراک

🗺️ مسیرها:
/addroute - ایجاد مسیر جدید
/listroutes - نمایش مسیرها
/removeroute [ID] - حذف مسیر
/updatesource [ID] - بروز‌رسانی صف
/sync [ID] - هماهنگ‌سازی صف

📅 برنامه‌ریزی:
/addplan - ایجاد برنامه
/listplans - نمایش برنامه‌ها
/editplan [ID] - ویرایش برنامه
/removeplan [ID] - حذف برنامه
/toggleplan [ID] - فعال/غیرفعال کردن

📊 اطلاعات:
/calendar - تقویم فعالیت‌ها
/logs - گزارش‌های اخیر
/help - این پیام

requirements: Type hints on every function (def func(x: int) -> str:)
